name: 13-things-mentally-strong-women-dont-do
description: Amy Morin's '13 Things Mentally Strong Women Don't Do' — a practical guide to building mental strength by giving up comparison, perfectionism, self-doubt, overthinking, and 9 other habits that hold women back.
useCase: Build mental strength by identifying and eliminating the 13 habits that undermine women's confidence, resilience, and authentic voice.
knownRisks: General advice — not a substitute for professional mental health treatment
Some principles may oversimplify complex psychological issues
Women-focused framing — some principles apply universally but the examples center women's experiences
